name: M1_materialize_eligible_for
description: [物化]把技能匹配达标的student→career写成eligible_for

name: R1_prerequisite_satisfied
description: 检查课程先修结构完整性(目录级)

name: R2_can_take_course
description: 判断学生是否满足某门课的全部先修

name: R3_recommend_next_courses
description: 推荐下一批可修课程(先修满足且未修过)

name: R4_skill_gap
description: 目标职业所需技能与学生已有技能的缺口

name: R5_eligible_careers
description: 基于专业流向+技能匹配率推荐职业(≥60%)

name: R7_recommend_electives_for_gap
description: 针对缺口推荐可补缺的选修课
pattern: Student(?s) -targets_career-> C; C -requires_skill-> gap; <-teaches_skill- course; R2 eligible
